syncedCommit: TODO(setup): set to the template HEAD sha this repo was instantiated/last synced from
syncedAt: TODO(setup): ISO date of that sync
_comment: Template-subscription anchor. A sweep diffs template HEAD against syncedCommit and files a migration issue when structural deltas appear. After applying a migration plan, update syncedCommit+syncedAt in the same PR. skipPaths lists template paths this repo deliberately diverges from (each entry should cite an ADR or CHANGELOG 'Unchanged (intentional)' line).
